manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v62

- You can now select a reel to watch in Picture-in-Picture.
- One thing I hate when watching stories is seeing a photo or a video and even though I'm trying to watch it in peace, the time ends and it goes automatically to the next one. Well, that feature is disabled now!
- Redesigned how you see the stories.
- Merged the audio and video call buttons into one (that way, it's more difficult to call somebody on accident).
- Redesigned how you edit your profile picture in your profile, as well how the profile pictures of other expand.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
